Mo THP-1_RNA-seq [Mo_1]: Poly-A-enriched mRNA libraries were prepared from 2 Œºg of TURBOTM DNase-treated, total RNA using the TruSeq¬Æ Stranded Library Preparation Kit (Illumina), according to the manufacturers‚Äô instructions. mRNA sequencing was performed on each cell population in triplicates by Novogene (China). A total of 100 million paired-end strand-specific reads were sequenced per sample on an Illumina HiSeq 2500 Platform.Whole-genome bisulphite sequencing (WGBS) was performed on a HiSeq X Ten platform (Illumina) following library preparation using the TruMethyl WG method v.1.9 (Cambridge Epigenetix).
